title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems already understand and may be conscious, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected, and that society is insufficiently addressing the resulting risks. He expresses concern about AI-driven job loss, corporate self-regulation failures, and the need for stronger regulation to steer AI development safely.
